{"query":"GTA VI Grand Theft Auto 6 Leonida map size comparison GTA V detailed","model":"mako","response_time_ms":1248,"verdict":null,"extra_info":null,"results":[{"url":"https://map.stateofleonida.net/?lang=en","title":"State of Leonida - Interactive GTA 6 Map","content":"![State of Leonida](assets/logos/Logo.png)
![Mapping Discord](assets/logos/mappingcool2.gif)"},{"url":"https://www.recharge.com/blog/en-gb/gta-6-map-leonida-vice-city-size-guide","title":"GTA 6 Map: Leonida, Vice City & Size Guide","content":"You can expect a staggering scale that includes a highly detailed dynamic weather system and, according to unconfirmed leaks, over 700 explorable interiors.
You will explore the six confirmed regions, compare the massive new map size to GTA 5 and RDR2, and dive into the latest community mapping projects.
Get ready to navigate this incredible world ahead of the highly anticipated November 19, 2026 release on PS5 and Xbox Series X|S.
The map size is significantly larger than GTA 5 and RDR2, boasting a dynamic weather system and 700+ potential interiors.
The GTA 6 map features six confirmed regions: Vice City, Leonida Keys, Grassrivers, Port Gellhorn, Hamlet, and Kelly County.
Grassrivers is the vast, swampy wetland area inspired by the Florida Everglades.
The exact size in kilometers is not officially confirmed, but community mapping projects estimate it to be significantly larger than GTA 5’s Los Santos, incorporating multiple cities and vast wilderness areas.
Yes, the Leonida Keys are a confirmed region, allowing players to explore an island chain inspired by the real-life Florida Keys.
Official file sizes are not yet confirmed for the PS5 and Xbox Series X|S, but given the massive map size and 700+ interiors, a substantial file size well over 100GB is highly likely."},{"url":"https://box.co.uk/blog/gta-6-vs-gta-5-map-story-size-changes","title":"GTA 6 vs GTA 5: What’s Different and Why It Matters","content":"Now, with Grand Theft Auto VI confirmed for 19 November 2026 on PlayStation 5 and Xbox Series X|S, and pre-orders live from 25 June 2026, players finally have a clear countdown to Rockstar’s next major open-world release.
Los Santos and Blaine County offered a mix of beaches, mountains and desert regions, but they were ultimately built within a more restrictive engine.
In the GTA 6 vs GTA 5 comparison, GTA 5 Online stands as a foundation.
GTA 6 Online will likely take full advantage of modern SSDs, faster CPUs, and enhanced server infrastructure.
Yes, GTA 6 is expected to be significantly larger than GTA 5 in terms of map density, interior detail, and environmental variety.
Rockstar has not confirmed exact numbers, but it’s widely expected that GTA 6’s story will be longer than GTA 5’s 30-hour campaign.
Players comparing GTA 6 to GTA 5 should expect significant improvements thanks to SSD speeds, better CPUs, and enhanced GPUs on platforms like the PlayStation 5.
Yes, GTA 6 returns to Vice City within the larger state of Leonida."}]}
